query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects) as total_projects, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts) as total_contacts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rawArticles) as total_articles, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipelineRuns) as total_runs
